tools.name: ask_fasal_doctor
tools.title: Ask Fasal Doctor
tools.description: Ask Bharat AI's Fasal Doctor for structured crop diagnosis, pest / disease prescriptions (ICAR-standard), mandi advice, irrigation advice, or general Indian agriculture guidance. Returns a professional clinical report when the question is about a plant / crop.

question.description: The farmer's question in English, Hindi, Hinglish or Marwadi. E.g. 'Wheat leaves turning yellow with orange stripes' or 'Aaj bajra ka mandi bhav Rajasthan'.

lang.description: Preferred reply language: en, hi (Hindi), hinglish, or mar (Marwadi).
